# create-neon-app

Starter kit for neon-styled web apps. Vanilla JS, no build step.

## Run

```bash
python3 -m http.server 8000
# or: npx serve
```

## Structure

```
index.html  - App shell: header, main, sidebar, footer
style.css   - Neon theme, CSS variables, component styles
main.js     - ES module, imports neon-ui + neon-fx
```

## External Libraries

```javascript
import { createKnob, createFxModule, showToast } from '../../packages/neon-ui/index.js';
import { Filter, Reverb, Compressor } from '../../packages/neon-fx/index.js';
```

## Color Variables

```css
--nc: #00ffff;  /* cyan - primary, load buttons, links */
--nm: #ff00ff;  /* magenta - secondary, save buttons, FX */
--nl: #39ff14;  /* green - success, active states, play */
--np: #bf5fff;  /* purple - labels, borders, panels */
--nr: #ff3366;  /* red - errors, delete */
--ny: #ffff00;  /* yellow - transport knobs */
--no: #ff6600;  /* orange - instruments */
```

## Layout

- `#app`: max-width 920px, centered, scanline overlay
- `header`: logo left, transport controls right
- `main > .main-layout`: flex row, main-column + sidebar
- `footer`: status-text left, step-display right
- Sidebar: 190px fixed width

## Components

### Buttons
- `.btn-machine.btn-square.btn-transport` - 30x30 with LED indicator
- `.save-btn-global` - magenta LED
- `.load-btn-global` - cyan LED
- `.playing` class - green glow when active
- `.btn-led` - 28x14 toggle LED
- `.btn-action` - text buttons

### Knobs (neon-ui)
```javascript
const knob = createKnob({
    value: 50, min: 0, max: 100,
    color: 'yellow',  // cyan|magenta|yellow|green|orange|purple
    size: 'small',    // small|medium|large
    onChange: (val) => {}
});
container.appendChild(knob.element);
```

### FX Modules (neon-ui + neon-fx)
```javascript
const filter = new Filter(audioContext, { cutoff: 2000, resonance: 5 });

const module = createFxModule({
    name: 'FILTER',
    enabled: false,
    controls: [
        { label: 'CUTOFF', value: 2000, min: 20, max: 20000, onChange: v => filter.setParam('cutoff', v) },
        { label: 'RESO', value: 5, min: 0, max: 30, onChange: v => filter.setParam('resonance', v) }
    ],
    onToggle: (on) => { filter.bypassed = !on; }
});
```

### Toasts
```javascript
showToast('Message', 'success');  // success|error|info
```

### Panels
```html
<section class="ui-panel">
    <div class="section-tag">TITLE</div>
    <div class="panel-content">...</div>
</section>
```

## AI Copilot

- Empty input: button shows "DEMO" with pulse animation
- Has text: button shows "AI GEN"
- `#ai-copilot.ai-loading` - shimmer animation during generation

## Conventions

- All caps for labels, tags, button text
- Letter-spacing: 1-4px on labels
- Font-weight: 700-900 for UI text
- Transitions: 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)
- Glows: box-shadow with color + rgba spread
- Borders: 1px solid rgba(color, 0.2-0.4)
- Backgrounds: linear-gradient(180deg, lighter, darker)

## Adding Features

1. Add HTML structure to index.html
2. Add styles following color/glow conventions
3. Import components from neon-ui
4. Import audio plugins from neon-fx
5. Wire up event handlers in main.js

## Audio Pattern

```javascript
let audioContext = null;

async function initAudio() {
    if (audioContext) return;
    audioContext = new AudioContext();
    // Create plugins, connect graph
}

// Call on user interaction (button click, etc.)
```
